steps.title: Link prediction to evidence
steps.content: Economists expected liberalization to make it easier for companies to raise money. Henry then found significant investment increases in countries after liberalization, which is evidence consistent with the prediction.

steps.title: Remove unsupported implications
steps.content: A misstates the timing of benefits, B invents serious negative effects, and C compares Thailand with Malaysia even though the passage gives only an average across 11 countries. The finding supports the existing scholarly view. The answer is D.
